content.text: A 2D plane defined by x and y axes. Quadrants: Q1(+,+), Q2(-,+), Q3(-,-), Q4(+,-).

content.name: Slope (m)
content.note: Parallel lines: m1 = m2. Perpendicular lines: m1 \times m2 = -1.

content.name: Straight Line Forms
content.formula: y = mx + c \\ y - y_1 = m(x - x_1) \\ \frac{x}{a} + \frac{y}{b} = 1

content.name: Parabola
content.formula: y^2 = 4ax \quad (axis\ along\ x) \\ x^2 = 4ay \quad (axis\ along\ y)
